ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., comment, post) */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Text of the content */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the content was created */,
  "content_status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., active, deleted, hidden) */,
  "content_language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, banned, suspended) */,
  "user_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile information */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "user_avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toxicity_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the score entry */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content being scored */,
  "toxic" REAL /* Score for toxicity level */,
  "severe_toxic" REAL /* Score for severe toxicity level */,
  "obscene" REAL /* Score for obscenity level */,
  "threat" REAL /* Score for threat level */,
  "insult" REAL /* Score for insult level */,
  "identity_hate" REAL /* Score for identity hate level */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the NLP model used for scoring */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the model's prediction */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score has been reviewed by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toxicity_scores_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator taking the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., delete, warn, ban) */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was taken */,
  "action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments by the moderator */,
  "action_effective_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_action_type FOREIGN KEY ("action_type") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the history entry */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content being updated */,
  "previous_text" TEXT /* Previous version of the content */,
  "updated_text" TEXT /* Updated version of the content */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who made the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_history_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_history_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the content category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  "category_color" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the action type */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type (e.g., delete, warn, ban) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "is_reversible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action can be reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics entry */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content being tracked */,
  "num_views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the content */,
  "num_reports" INTEGER /* Number of reports filed against the content */,
  "num_actions" INTEGER /* Number of moderation actions taken on the content */,
  "num_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the content */,
  "num_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes for the content */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  "num_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the content */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score based on likes, comments, and shares */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_statistics_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
